title: CSV, JSON Lines, Schemas, Stable Output, Redaction, and Accessible Reports · Spiral Review
summary: A delayed crawl review reconstructs csv, json lines, schemas, stable output, redaction, and accessible reports from authorization, revision, seed, URL key, response identity, robots decision, parse record, extraction provenance, frontier event, report row, failure, and recovery evidence. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for versioned machine and accessible human report after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal…
objectives: Define UTF-8, newline handling, dialect, ordered fields, quoting, formula policy, missing values, limits, and atomic replacement.
Emit one bounded versioned JSON record per line with stable types, Unicode policy, provenance, and explicit invalid-record handling.
Sort by documented semantic keys and stable tie-breakers so concurrency, retries, and resume do not change comparable output.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-web-scraper-python cumulative authorized crawler and accessible site-audit portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python policy, URL, response, tree, frontier, record,
and report models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only. Sockets, DNS, public or private
sites, credentials, host files, native HTTPX, Beautiful Soup, lxml, Scrapy, Playwright browsers,
accessibility claims, legal review, load, schedules, and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlPolicy:
    owner_authorization_id: str
    allowed_origins: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_pages: int = 240
    maximum_response_bytes: int = 2_000_000
    minimum_origin_spacing_seconds: float = 1.0


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class CrawlEvidence:
    revision: str
    policy_digest: str
    frontier_digest: str
    report_digest: str
    accessibility_review_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Authorized Python crawler portfolio ready"

lines.label: assumption

lines.label: evidence
lines.text: A changed authentic task independently demonstrates this outcome: Retain decision evidence while removing secrets, unnecessary personal data, query tokens, cookies, source excerpts, and unsafe raw markup by policy. Artifact under review: versioned machine and accessible human report.

options.text: For separate evidence from confidence, crawl one convenient page, omit owner authorization, revision, URL and robots policy, response budgets, parser and selector limits, provenance, frontier and concurrency evidence, changed fixtures, privacy, security, accessibility, stop, recovery, and controlled native transfer, then accept plausible rows as crawler proof.
The record names the assumption, applies Provenance Redaction, and reports a changed-case check tied to the stakeholder decision.
The record says the result looks right but supplies no quantity, trace, condition, or counterexample. That claim does not survive the separate evidence from confidence evidence boundary.

content.title: Evidence defense
content.text: Use the case, one assumption, one observable result, and one limitation. Do not copy the competency statement: Retain decision evidence while removing secrets, unnecessary personal data, query tokens, cookies, source excerpts, and unsafe raw markup by policy.
